name: Pop!_OS
description: Pop!_OS is developed by System76, a Linux hardware company, and it shows — hardware support is exceptional, especially for NVIDIA GPUs and AMD systems. It ships with a customised GNOME desktop featuring a powerful tiling window manager extension (COSMIC), making it beloved by developers and power users who want productivity without sacrificing aesthetics. Pop!_OS is also a premier gaming distro thanks to its graphics driver tooling.
